title: Fiber-seq for Flash Frozen Mouse Tissue for IGVF
author: Jasmine Sakr
materials: Make buffers and solutions Buffer A %s %s 0.5 Molarity (M) Spermidine and store at 4 °C 20 % (v/v) Sodium Dodecyl Sulfate (SDS) and store at Room temperature

steps.title: Keep flash frozen tissue samples on dry ice until lysis
steps.instruction: Keep flash frozen tissue samples on dry ice until lysis.

steps.title: Spin 5 million nuclei at 250...
steps.instruction: Spin 5 million nuclei at 250 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes .

steps.title: Add 20 µL Proteinase k and...
steps.instruction: Add 20 µL Proteinase k and 10 µL RNAse A to each tube

steps.title: Set two thermomixers at 56 °C and 25 °C
steps.instruction: Set two thermomixers at 56 °C and 25 °C

steps.title: Prepare and label the following tubes...
steps.instruction: Prepare and label the following tubes for DNA extraction (for each labeling reaction): Bead strainer in a collection tube 2 mL tube for wash step 2 mL tube for elution step 1.5 tube for final elution Add 150 µL of gDNA Elution Buffer II to the 2 mL elution tubes

steps.title: Prepare an ice bucket and keep...
steps.instruction: Prepare an ice bucket and keep the following on ice Proteinase k and RNAse A Pre-chill gentleMACS C Tube and two 5 mL tubes 0.5 Molarity (M) Spermidine

steps.title: Add 2 mL Nuclei Extraction Buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 2 mL Nuclei Extraction Buffer to a chilled gentleMACS C Tube.

steps.title: Drop whole frozen tissue into the...
steps.instruction: Drop whole frozen tissue into the chilled gentleMACS C Tube with 2 mL Nuclei Extraction Buffer.

steps.title: Invert immediately , ensuring tissue is...
steps.instruction: Invert immediately , ensuring tissue is not stuck to the bottom or side. Proceed immediately to load onto Octo Dissociator and add Octo Cooler over each gentleMACS C Tube.

steps.title: Run the gentleMACS Program 4C_nuclei_1 on...
steps.instruction: Run the gentleMACS Program 4C_nuclei_1 on the Octo Dissociator ( 00:05:00 ).

steps.title: Remove the gentleMACS C Tube and...
steps.instruction: Remove the gentleMACS C Tube and ensure tissue did not get stuck on the sides by tapping the tube.

steps.title: Spin down in 4 °C centrifuge for 00:00:10
steps.instruction: Spin down in 4 °C centrifuge for 00:00:10 .

steps.title: Mix the nuclei suspension thoroughly by...
steps.instruction: Mix the nuclei suspension thoroughly by pipetting with a 5 mL pipet.

steps.title: Filter nuclei suspension through 70 µm...
steps.instruction: Filter nuclei suspension through 70 µm MACS SmartStrainer into a 5 mL tube.

steps.title: Wash empty, used gentleMACS C Tube...
steps.instruction: Wash empty, used gentleMACS C Tube with an additional 2 mL Nuclei Extraction Buffer . Close the cap and swish to recover any nuclei stuck to the sides.

steps.title: Filter the 2 mL additional Nuclei...
steps.instruction: Filter the 2 mL additional Nuclei Extraction Buffer through the 70 µm MACS SmartStrainer into the same 5 mL tube (total volume now 4 mL).

steps.title: Make enough RSB for the total number of samples
steps.instruction: Make enough RSB for the total number of samples. %s %s

steps.title: Centrifuge the 4 mL nuclei suspension...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the 4 mL nuclei suspension at 350 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes .

steps.title: Remove the supernatant without disrupting the pellet
steps.instruction: Remove the supernatant without disrupting the pellet.

steps.title: Resuspend nuclei pellet in 3 mL RSB
steps.instruction: Resuspend nuclei pellet in 3 mL RSB.

steps.title: Filter nuclei suspension through 30 µm...
steps.instruction: Filter nuclei suspension through 30 µm MACS SmartStrainer into a new 5 mL tube.

steps.title: Make aliquots of 5 million nuclei in 1
steps.instruction: Make aliquots of 5 million nuclei in 1.5 mL tubes.

steps.title: During the 5 min, mix the...
steps.instruction: During the 5 min, mix the following and keep Reaction Master Mix On ice Buffer A + Spermidine Room temperature %s %s Reaction Master Mix (75 U) On ice %s %s

steps.title: Remove supernatant and resuspend the pellet...
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant and resuspend the pellet in 300 µL of Reaction Master Mix buffer.

steps.title: Incubate on 25 °C heat block for 00:10:00
steps.instruction: Incubate on 25 °C heat block for 00:10:00 .

steps.title: Add 15 µL of 20% SDS...
steps.instruction: Add 15 µL of 20% SDS to each sample (final concentration of 1%)

steps.title: Thoroughly mix by gently inverting tube
steps.instruction: Thoroughly mix by gently inverting tube. Do not vortex or pipette to mix.

steps.title: Mix gently by pipetting using wide-bore tip
steps.instruction: Mix gently by pipetting using wide-bore tip.

steps.title: Incubate in a thermal mixer at...
steps.instruction: Incubate in a thermal mixer at 2000 rpm, 56 °C, 10 minutes .

steps.title: Add 300 µL Protein Separation solution
steps.instruction: Add 300 µL Protein Separation solution .

steps.title: Mix on vertical rotating mixer for...
steps.instruction: Mix on vertical rotating mixer for 20 rpm, °C, 1 minute .

steps.title: Centrifuge for 16000 x g, °C, 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 16000 x g, °C, 10 minutes .

steps.title: Using a wide-bore tip, transfer as...
steps.instruction: Using a wide-bore tip, transfer as much of the upper phase containing the DNA to a labeled, empty 2 mL tube without disrupting the pellet at the bottom.

steps.title: Add 2 DNA capture beads to each sample
steps.instruction: Add 2 DNA capture beads to each sample.

steps.title: Add 425 µL of isopropanol
steps.instruction: Add 425 µL of isopropanol.

steps.title: Mix on a vertical rotating mixer...
steps.instruction: Mix on a vertical rotating mixer at 10 rpm, °C, 10 minutes to attach DNA to the beads.

steps.title: During the wash steps, work quickly...
steps.instruction: During the wash steps, work quickly to prevent DNA from drying out on beads!

steps.title: Discard liquid by keeping tube upright,...
steps.instruction: Discard liquid by keeping tube upright, insert pipette tip and gently push beads aside to remove liquid.

steps.title: Add 500 µL Wash Buffer
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL Wash Buffer .

steps.title: Mix by gently inverting the tube 3 times
steps.instruction: Mix by gently inverting the tube 3 times.

steps.title: Discard liquid by keeping tube upright,...
steps.instruction: Discard liquid by keeping tube upright, insert pipette tip and gently push beads aside to remove liquid.

steps.title: Add 500 µL Wash Buffer
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL Wash Buffer .

steps.title: Mix by gently inverting the tube 3 times
steps.instruction: Mix by gently inverting the tube 3 times.

steps.title: Discard liquid by keeping tube upright,...
steps.instruction: Discard liquid by keeping tube upright, insert pipette tip and gently push beads aside to remove liquid.

steps.title: Pour the beads into the bead...
steps.instruction: Pour the beads into the bead retainer that is in a collection tube.

steps.title: Pulse spin (≤ 1 second) the...
steps.instruction: Pulse spin (≤ 1 second) the tubes to remove any residual wash buffer from the beads.

steps.title: Separate the bead retainer from the...
steps.instruction: Separate the bead retainer from the collection tube and pour the beads into the labeled tube with 150 μL of elution buffer and save the bead retainer for a future step.

steps.title: Incubate on thermal mixer at 56...
steps.instruction: Incubate on thermal mixer at 56 °C for 00:10:00 and during incubation, make sure all sides of the beads are exposed to elution buffer by tilting the tube almost horizontally and gently shaking after the first 5 min.

steps.title: Incubate at Room temperature for 01:00:00...
steps.instruction: Incubate at Room temperature for 01:00:00 or 4 °C Overnight for the DNA to homogenize .

steps.title: Pour the eluate and the glass...
steps.instruction: Pour the eluate and the glass beads into the bead retainer that is placed in the final labeled tube.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 12000 rpm, °C, 30...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 12000 rpm, °C, 30 seconds to separate the eluate from the glass beads.

steps.title: Mix gently by pipetting using wide-bore tip
steps.instruction: Mix gently by pipetting using wide-bore tip.

steps.title: Follow "ONT Library Prep for Whole...
steps.instruction: Follow "ONT Library Prep for Whole Genome Sequencing" protocol to build libraries for whole genome sequencing using Oxford Nanopore platform.

steps.title: Qubit each tubes and keep on...
steps.instruction: Qubit each tubes and keep on ice until library prep or store in -20°C
